site.title: Winery software — lot and inventory management
site.description: PROOF unifies lots, finished-goods inventory, and team workflows for independent wineries. Accessible technology for day-to-day winemaking.

meta.title: PROOF — Winery Software | Lot & Inventory Management
meta.description: Lot control, cellar, finished-goods inventory, and team in one place. Accessible technology for independent wineries. 90-day free trial.

hero.subtitleLine2: It is the operational memory of your production.
hero.body: Upload documents and evidence in PROOF. Connect your external agent (Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT) via MCP to extract, query, and operate on your data.

contrast.title: ERPs record. PROOF understands.
contrast.subtitle: We do not replace your accounting. We give memory to your liquid operation.

cards.title: Records vs. context
cards.body: An ERP stores numbers. PROOF understands that lot 2026-001 is in malolactic and the winemaker chose to wait 48 more hours.

cards.title: Forms vs. conversation
cards.body: Dictate in the cellar, upload tickets, or ask your connected agent. PROOF structures the info without breaking your flow.

cards.title: Reports vs. answers
cards.body: No hunting through ten screens. Ask "which lots are ready?" and get the answer with full context.

productores.title: A living timeline for every lot
productores.subtitle: Every lot follows a clear cycle — move a stage in one tap, no spreadsheets.

winemaker.label: Winemaker
bullets: 🍷 Full timeline for every lot — from harvest to bottle
📋 Protocols by style — red, white, sparkling, rosé
🔗 Connect your MCP agent — operate PROOF from Claude Desktop or Cursor

stageHints: Log the harvest and notify your team in one place.
Prevent surprises — catch issues before they scale.
Track temperature, density, and readings for the full life of the lot.
Follow malolactic conversion with a clear record of every decision.
Monitor aging time, vessel, and readiness without spreadsheets.
Move to finished goods — labels, cases, and bottles ready to ship.

brewer.label: Brewer
bullets: 🍺 Recipe control (grain bill, hops, yeast) per batch
📋 Protocols by style — IPA, Stout, Lager, Sour, Witbier
🌡️ Fermentation and density monitoring (OG/FG) with alerts
💡 "How many liters of IPA do I have available?"

stageHints: Log grain bill, strike temp, and mash notes for the batch.
Record boil time, hop additions, and OG in one timeline.
Track fermentation curves and FG with automatic alerts.
Schedule dry-hop days and document aroma checks.
Monitor conditioning time and carbonation targets.
Package with batch codes linked to every keg and can.

distiller.label: Distiller
bullets: 🌵 Full traceability from harvest to packaging
📋 Protocols by category — blanco, reposado, añejo, extra añejo
✂️ Cut logging (heads, hearts, tails) with master distiller decisions
💡 "How much reposado is ready to bottle?"

stageHints: Trace agave source, jima date, and field notes from day one.
Log cooking cycles and brix before fermentation starts.
Monitor fermentation health with a shared team record.
Document cuts — heads, hearts, tails — with distiller decisions.
Track resting time, barrel, and category compliance.
Package with full traceability from field to bottle.

bodega.title: Full control of finished goods and outbound orders
bodega.subtitle: From bottling to delivery — stock, portfolio, and balances in one operational view.
bullets: 📦 Finished-goods inventory — labels, cases, and bottles with live availability
🚚 Order fulfillment — outbound shipments with stock checks and lot traceability
💳 Customer portfolio — balances, credit limits, and collection due alerts
📊 Operational balance — rotation, margins, and critical SKUs without Excel exports

upload.title: Upload what you have. PROOF understands.
upload.subtitle: Tickets, invoices, delivery notes, label photos — any format.

pricing.title: Plans that grow with your operation
pricing.subtitle: From $299/mo billed annually · 90-day trial, no card

plans.name: Regular
plans.description: For a winery getting started. Harvest trial included.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For teams operating in real time.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For groups with multiple sites and integrations.

finalCta.title: Give your operation a memory.
finalCta.subtitle: Every bottle tells a story. We track the proof.

upgradeModal.title: This feature is part of the Pro plan
upgradeModal.body: Team chat, more lots, and extended memory from $899/mo ($666/mo billed annually).

meta.title: About
meta.description: PROOF brings accessible technology to the winery day-to-day: lot control, inventory, and team — without enterprise pricing.

hero.p1: PROOF started by listening to winemakers and winery owners who run on spreadsheets, paper, and memory — and cannot afford software built for corporations.
hero.p2: We want lots, cellar, and team in one place: easy to use every morning, without enterprise pricing or a steep learning curve.

insight.title: "Why did this wine turn out this way?"
insight.body: Not how many liters you made — you already know that. It is that year's weather, decisions in the moment, lab results, and notes that lived only in someone's head. PROOF holds that operational memory so your winery does not depend on recall.
insight.quote: "What will I be glad I saved 20 years from now to understand this wine?"

beliefs.title: Modern tools, accessible pricing.
beliefs.body: An independent winery deserves real control over production — without paying like a multinational. Technology should show up on the morning shift, not sit in a manual no one opens.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Reach the PROOF team — winery software for lot tracking and finished-goods inventory. Direct reply from people who know the product.

contact.title: Have a question? Write to us.
contact.subtitle: No call center, no three-day support ticket. Write to us and someone who actually knows the product will reply.
contact.emailHint: You can also email us directly at

form.name: Name
form.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We will reply soon.
form.errorDefault: We could not send your message. Please try again.

legal.draftBanner: ⚠️ This document is an initial draft. It will be reviewed by legal counsel before public launch.

meta.title: Privacy policy
meta.description: How PROOF collects, uses, and protects your winery and team data.

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
paragraphs: Account information (name, email, organization).
Usage information (lots, events, documents you upload to the platform).
Technical information (IP address, device type, browser).

sections.title: 2. How we use your information
paragraphs: To operate and improve PROOF.
To provide support.
To send account-related communications (never spam).

sections.title: 3. How we protect your information
paragraphs: Encryption in transit and at rest.
Role-restricted access within your organization.
Your production data is yours — we never sell it or share it with third parties without your consent.

sections.title: 4. Who we share information with
paragraphs: Infrastructure providers (hosting, database).
Never with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
paragraphs: Access, correct, or delete your information.
Export your data at any time.
Close your account whenever you want.

sections.title: 6. Data retention
paragraphs: We keep your information while your account is active.
If you close your account, we delete your data according to applicable legal timelines.

sections.title: 7. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We will email you if we make material changes.

sections.title: 8. Contact
paragraphs: privacidad@proof.app

meta.title: Terms of service
meta.description: Terms and conditions for using PROOF, winery management software.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By using PROOF, you accept these terms.

sections.title: 2. Service description
paragraphs: PROOF is an operational management platform for artisan producers (wineries, breweries, distilleries) and their distributors.

sections.title: 3. Accounts and memberships
paragraphs: You are responsible for keeping your account secure.
Plans and pricing may change with prior notice.
You may cancel your subscription at any time.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable use
paragraphs: Use PROOF for illegal purposes.
Attempt to access other organizations' data.
Resell or redistribute the service without authorization.

sections.title: 5. Ownership of your data
paragraphs: Everything you upload to PROOF (lots, documents, notes, photos) belongs to you. PROOF only processes it to provide the service.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual property
paragraphs: PROOF software, design, and brand are owned by PROOF. You may not copy or redistribute the platform.

sections.title: 7. Service availability
paragraphs: We do our best to keep PROOF available 24/7, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: PROOF is provided "as is". We are not liable for indirect losses arising from use of the platform.

sections.title: 9. Changes to these terms
paragraphs: We will email you if we make material changes.

sections.title: 10. Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of Mexico.

sections.title: 11. Contact
paragraphs: legal@proof.app

steps.title: Your Swiss army knife, not an ERP
steps.body: PROOF is not here to replace every tool you use. The cellar whiteboard stays at the center of your operation — we are the memory that connects what's on the wall with your team and your lots.

steps.title: Calendar + whiteboard photo
steps.body: Pick a category before uploading: Harvest, Analysis, Fermentation, Malolactic, Aging, Bottling, or Cellar. Everything stays classified from day one.

steps.title: Lab and cellar results
steps.body: Upload lab PDFs or photos and cellar control sheets. PROOF stores them as evidence — ready to review on lots and calendar.

steps.title: Ready to start
steps.body: Review your lots on Home and upload your first whiteboard photo or lab result from Schedule.

upload.skippedPdf: Saved {filename}. PDFs are not read automatically yet — upload a photo or tell me vendor, supplies, and amount.{total}

upload.noApiKey: Saved {filename}. To read tickets automatically, connect your external agent on the dashboard (MCP) or complete supplier and line items manually.
upload.noApiKeyAgent: could not read {filename} automatically, how do I register it?
upload.visionDisabled: Saved {filename}. For this pilot, import tickets with your MCP agent (Connect → import_winemaker_ticket), not in-app OCR.
upload.visionDisabledAgent: saved {filename}; help me import it with the MCP agent
upload.visionFailed: Saved {filename}, but automatic reading failed. Tell me vendor, supplies (grapes, cork, bottles…), and amount to complete it.
upload.visionFailedAgent: reading {filename} failed, help me register vendor and supplies
upload.skippedNotImage: Saved {filename}. We only read receipt images for now — use a photo or screenshot.
upload.skippedNotImageAgent: I just uploaded {filename}, how do I register it?
upload.unclassified: Saved {filename}, but I could not extract vendor or supplies. Tell me who sold, what you bought (grapes, cork, bottles…), and the amount.
upload.unclassifiedAgent: help me complete receipt {filename} with vendor and supplies
upload.success: Read {filename}: {vendor}{summary}.{total} Data saved to your winery. {question}

totals.litrosKpi: Agreed liters (not mixed in KPI): {liters} L

nuevo.receiveNow: Receive in cellar now (creates the lot on canvas). If unchecked, confirm arrival later in Purchases.

errors.sessionUnavailable: Distiller session unavailable. Reload the page.
errors.invalidProducts: Check liters and price for each agave

detail.confirmDescription: Record output and received liters per agave. Shrinkage and proportional freight are calculated; one lot is created per product.
detail.confirmDescriptionCanvas: On confirm, the lot is created in the cellar and appears on the canvas.
detail.cannotConfirm: Trip must be confirmed or in transit to record arrival.
detail.alreadyReceived: This trip was already received or cannot be confirmed here.

errors.lotNotCreated: Lot was not created in the cellar

context.enBodegaCrudoStale: {days} days raw without bottling. Each day is opportunity cost.
context.enBodegaCrudoReady: {liters} L ready — start a run when you have bottles and labels.
context.enBodegaCrudoAvailable: Bulk available — start a run when you have bottles and labels.
context.enProduccion: Active run. Closing calculates actual cost per bottle and marks the lot finished.
context.terminado: Lot bottled. Review cost per bottle before setting sale prices.
context.vendidoParcial: Mixed inventory remains (bulk and/or bottles). Do not mix lots in one order.

produccion.title: Production
produccion.stockCritical: Critical stock: check empty bottles and labels before bottling.

errors.schemaPending: Apply scripts/destilador-apply-all.sql (+ close-run migration) in Supabase.

cerrar.title: Close run
cerrar.onClose: On close: deducts empty bottles, creates cases (12 bt), and calculates actual cost per bottle.

opsHome.error: Could not load the summary. Try again.

subtitle.distributor: Inventory, orders, and receivables at a glance.
subtitle.distiller: Liters, lots, payables, and bottling runs at a glance.

connectionHub.title: Connect your AI assistant
connectionHub.subtitle: Connect ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, or Grok to PROOF. Your assistant can query lots, inventory, orders, and operate on your data.
connectionHub.scopeNote: The assistant only gets access to your own account and organization.
connectionHub.tokenExpired: Token expired — copy a fresh one before connecting
connectionHub.oauthHint: Auth: paste a fresh session JWT in your MCP client headers. Metadata:

pilotDryRun.title: Field dry-run (day before)
pilotDryRun.hint: Verify JWT and connection before the visit. Expires ~1h — renew if tools disappear.
pilotDryRun.step1: Tap “Test connection” — it should say OK.
pilotDryRun.step2: Copy Cursor config (or download the token for Claude).
pilotDryRun.step3: In the agent: “List my active lots” and “Summarize my winery status”.
pilotDryRun.step4: Optional: import a sample ticket with import_winemaker_ticket.

clients.cursorHint: Add PROOF as an MCP server in Cursor.
clients.cursorStep2: Add a server with the connection URL above.
clients.cursorStep3: Paste a fresh session token in the Authorization header (Advanced options). Tokens expire ~1h — refresh when tools stop working.
clients.claudeStep3: Quit Claude completely (Cmd+Q) and reopen it.
clients.claudeStep4: You should see PROOF tools (hammer icon) in chat.
clients.chatgptHint: Requires a paid plan (Plus/Pro/Business). Use chatgpt.com in the browser — the desktop app sometimes hides Apps.
clients.chatgptStep1: On chatgpt.com: Settings → Apps (sometimes «Apps & Connectors»). At the bottom: Advanced settings → turn on Developer mode.
clients.chatgptStep2: Go back to Apps and click Create / Create app. Paste the PROOF connection URL.
clients.chatgptStep3: Sign in with your PROOF account if prompted. In a new chat: + → More → Developer mode → enable the connector.
clients.grokStep1: Open MCP connector settings in Grok.
clients.grokStep2: Add a custom connector with the connection URL.
clients.grokStep3: Authenticate with your PROOF account and confirm access.

bar.message: Connect your AI assistant to PROOF via MCP.

tools.list_lotes: Active lots with pipeline etapa, dias_sin_registro, and attention flags.
tools.get_resumen_bodega: Winery KPIs, health, per-stage counts, and lots needing attention.
tools.list_etiquetas: Cellar labels with produced, consumed, and available per stock line.
tools.list_mensajes: Team chat messages; filter by lot or timestamp.
tools.get_cobro_context: Structured data to draft collection messages.
tools.enviar_mensaje: Post a team chat message (optional lote_id).
tools.crear_lote: Create an active pipeline lot (plan lot limit applies).
tools.registrar_embotellado: Register bottling and create cellar stock (label + memory limits apply).
tools.cambiar_etapa_lote: Move a lot to a new pipeline stage (memory limit applies).
